checks.note: Returns list[dict[str, Any]] but staging files have a known recurring schema with 'stage', 'target', and 'checks' keys. A StagingEntry TypedDict (or discriminated union of per-stage TypedDicts) would document the expected shape and catch key typos at type-check time.

annotations.message: Return type list[dict[str, Any]] loses the known staging file schema; consider a StagingEntry TypedDict or union type.
